fusion-title-text fusion-title-size-two" style="--awb-text-color:#3c3950;--awb-font-size:40px;"><h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="font-family:&quot;Montserrat&quot;;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:40;line-height:1.2;">Hi, I’m <br />Dr. Paul Norio Morton.</h2></div><div class="fusion-text fusion-text-1" style="--awb-font-size:16px;--awb-line-height:23px;--awb-text-color:#333333;--awb-text-font-family:&quot;Montserrat&quot;;--awb-text-font-style:normal;--awb-text-font-weight:400;"><p><em>I was raised in Kea’au on the <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/alii-health-center/">Big Island</a>. While attending college in Ohio, I was also a volunteer firefighter. The feeling I got when helping in rescue operations convinced me that I wanted to become a doctor. My love of sports, helping people, and <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/technology-in-orthopedics/">technology</a> have come together in my Orthopedic Practice at the Hawaii Sport and Spine.</em></p><p><em>I specialize in hips and knees and am the first <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/what-is-an-orthopedic-surgeon/">Orthopedic Surgeon</a> in Hawai’i who is Fellowship-trained in Robotic joint Replacement. Some of my patients have even nicknamed me “The Robot Doc.” I believe <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/robotic-hip-knee-surgery-guide/">robotic surgery</a> is more precise, less invasive has fewer complications, and will get you back out there feeling pain-free faster.</em></p><p><em>And although I use the latest <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/technology-in-orthopedics/">technology</a>, I still believe in good, old-fashioned, friendly, and personalized care.</em></p><p><em>If you’re having issues with your hips or knees, please give me a call today. Let’s find the best solution for you and get you back to being active, again!</em></p><p><em>Mahalo for entrusting me with your care,</em></p></div><div class="fusion-title title fusion-title-3 fusion-sep-none fusion-title-text fusion-title-size-three paul-norio" style="--awb-text-color:#000000;--awb-font-size:24px;"><h3 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left class="wpproslider_t3_quote" title="Honolulu Orthopedic Surgeon | Dr. Paul Norio Morton, MD 34"></noscript><div class='readmoretextdiv indrevlineclamp' data-lines='8' data-revid='13'><span class="wprevpro_star_imgs_T3"><span class="starloc1 wprevpro_star_imgs wprevpro_star_imgsloc1"><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span></span></span> <span class="wppro-reviewtext_T3">I’ve lived with my left hip injury for 34 years since ‘86 or ‘87, I was reluctant to get it repaired after seeing 2 previous surgeons as a child, &amp; in the ‘90 as an adult. The 1st surgeon as a child was reluctant to perform the surgery because he said it was too close the nerves &amp; it’s dangerous, so my parents &amp; I accepted that. The second surgeon as an adult said he wouldn’t recommend it, I was too young &amp; I’ll wear it out by the time I’m 30, so I accepted that answer &amp; gave up. Within the past 3 years, since 2017, my right hip became sore &amp; I thought it was muscle pain &amp; tried to walk it off ignoring my wife’s advice to see a doctor. Finally in 2020 I decide to see my doctor, Dr. Auora Mariani MD, who referred me to Dr. Paul Morton. Come to find out, I wore out my right hip &amp; it wore down to bone on bone, &amp; that was more painful than my already injured left hip.When I first seen <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">Dr. Morton</a> I can see how sincere &amp; anxious to take on this challenge. I remember his words of I like challenges. He seen my CT scan &amp; X rays &amp; I could tell he already had a plan of attack. I finally got the left side done on 28 Nov 2020, &amp; plan to repair the right side after <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">Dr. Morton</a> feels the left side is stable. Taking those walks with the physical therapist Carolina at Queen’s I was amazed how different life is now that my walking has improved. I used to drag my left left leg &amp; turn from the hip to walk instead bending my leg up. I thank God that he has led me to <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">Dr. Morton</a>. I can’t wait till both hips are repaired &amp; then I can finally spend more time playing outside with my 2 boys, helping them with their Judo exercises, &amp; golfing with my father in law. Thanks <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">Dr. Morton</a>. I really can’t thank you enough!</span> <span class="wprev_showdate_T3"> - 11/18/2020</span></div><div class='divwprsrdmore' style='opacity:0;'><span class='wprs_rd_more'>read more</span><span The second surgeon as an adult said he wouldn’t recommend it, I was too young &amp; I’ll wear it out by the time I’m 30, so I accepted that answer &amp; gave up. Within the past 3 years, since 2017, my right hip became sore &amp; I thought it was muscle pain &amp; tried to walk it off ignoring my wife’s advice to see a doctor. class="wpproslider_t3_quote" title="Honolulu Orthopedic Surgeon | Dr. Paul Norio Morton, MD 34"></noscript><div class='readmoretextdiv indrevlineclamp' data-lines='8' data-revid='321'><span class="wprevpro_star_imgs_T3"><span class="starloc1 wprevpro_star_imgs wprevpro_star_imgsloc1"><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span><span class="svgicons svg-wprsp-star"></span></span></span> <span class="wppro-reviewtext_T3">I found Dr Morton through his website which was extremely informative and I learned much <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">about</a> <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/robotic-hip-replacement/">hip replacement</a> surgery. Since I live on Maui, my first visit was via tele-health. I immediately felt a connection with Dr Morton. He is clearly an expert in his field, yet very humble and willing to really listen to me as a patient. He inquired <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">about</a> my wife as a caregiver and he arranged for a visit for her with a neurosurgeon to assess her neck pain. We flew to Oahu for a personal visit where he explained alternatives to surgery and answered every question that came to mind. My hip was so painful that I opted for replacement surgery. His awesome office staff made all the arrangements. The surgery was very successful. He is such a skillful surgeon that I have been recovering with minimal pain. He visited me in the <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/speedy-recovery-after-joint-replacement/">recovery</a> room and again at my hospital room. He is not one of those doctors that does surgery and moves on to the next patient. He is committed to follow up appointments in the months and years to come. I really wish that there were more than five stars because Dr Morton deserves way more. FOLLOW UP - I had a one year follow up Zoom appointment with Dr Morton. He explained the X-rays very well. I continue to be so happy with the result, because the hip is now aligned so well that back pain is non-existent and my knees are pain free unless I over exert them. He also took time to review my latest knee X-rays and recommended a non- surgical course of action. Dr Morton also reminded me to have annual hip X-rays sent to him for review. I am so grateful that he is committed to my continued hip and knee health. FOLLOW UP: I had a 2 year televisiit with Dr Morton. He showed me from the X-ray how the bone is attaching to the implant. My hip feels great. Also, congratulations are in order to Dr Morton and his wife for Max’s birth. FOLLOW UP: I had a 4 year follow up with Dr Morton. He reviewed the X-rays and suggested more PT for a strain that is causing some twinges in my hip area. We have moved to the mainland and Dr Morton gave me some really helpful advice <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/about-dr-morton/">about</a> choosing a surgeon for a potential <a href="https://www.jointreplacementhawaii.com/knee-replacement-minimally-invasive/">knee replacement</a>. I really appreciate the time he took with me even though he cannot treat me because we live out of state. I highly recommend Dr Morton to anyone in Hawai’i who needs hip or knee surgery.</span> <span class="wprev_showdate_T3"> - 6/27/2025</span></div><div class='divwprsrdmore' style='opacity:0;'><span  sections.forEach((s) => {
